This is an #orchid from the genus Ophrys. My friend received it mislabeled as O. fuciflora. I think it's O. incubacea.

This genus is known as bee orchids because they deceptively imitate female bees both visually & with pheromones to get pollinated by naive male bees trying to mate! #Invert 🌱🪴🌎
